[[File:Grail.svg|thumb]]
Counter-Spiralling is the process of actively identifying [[Maelstrom|Maelstroms]] and other psychohazards which can cause [[Spiralling]] and disengaging with them. 

It is linked to the concept of [[advancement]] vs [[aswerving]]. 

You are anagogically ascending by counter-spiralling and following firmlaw, widening yourself instead of narrowing<ref>https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=eJzYzZUoJ3c</ref> 
[[Category:Counter-Spiralling]]
[[Category:Spiralling]]
[[sn:Counter-Spiralling]]==In Catgirl Simulator==
In Catgirl Simulator, the aspect of Counter-Spiralling corresponds to one of the Ninefold Vaccine's parts. It's a retrofitting of the aspect system from the game Cultist Simulator, and while some elements, such as tools, are not present in Catgirl Simulator, Counter-Spiralling plays a crucial role.

Counter-Spiralling aligns with the Grail Aspect, symbolizing desire and physical experiences, forming a vaccine against the detrimental effects of Spiralling. Through indulging in diverse experiences, individuals can counteract the tendency to spiral into a narrow perspective or issue.
====Lore Elements====
Catgirl Simulator includes 12 lore elements related to Counter-Spiralling:

A Hedonist's Secret (fragmentgrail): In the crimson dance of desire, the hedonist discovers that new experiences are the truest colors of life.

Emissary's Incantation (fragmentgrailb): The Great Mother, the custodian of limitless encounters, hums the rhythm of primal connections.

Rite of Revelry (fragmentgrailc): A symphony of sensations that unlocks the heart to the carousel of existence, making even the notion of sacrifice an intoxicating dance.

Harmony of Embrace (fragmentgraild): Each Name of the Grail is a celebration of connection. We echo them, hoping to imbibe the pulsating energy they exude.

Chronicle of Delight (fragmentgraile): Some joys are so potent they can warp the very fabric of reality. Such delights are born from the unfettered exploration of the new.

Anthic Insight (fragmentgrailf): The elusive Flowermaker, an emblem of the unknown, draws the eye of the Hours. Exploring his works is like traversing an uncharted landscape.

Insatiable Paradox (fragmentgrailg): The Grail, the Flowermaker, and the Beach-Crow depict the mosaic of unending desire. Enclosed within this ever-changing puzzle lies the doctrine of Hunger, Greed, and Yearning.
====Influences====
There are 4 levels of influences related to Counter-Spiralling:

Whisper of Sensations (influencegrail): A myriad of experiences unfurl, the first steps of Counter-Spiralling.

Array of Experiences (influencegrailc): The whirlpool of Spiralling is dispersed by an explosion of experiences.

Mosaic of Existence (influencegraile): Every facet of life shimmers in defiance of Spiralling.

Life's Cornucopia (influencegrailg): An endless stream of experiences, the ultimate shield against Spiralling.
====Books====
At least 12 books touch upon the theme of Counter-Spiralling:

Thinking, Fast and Slow (bookgraila.1): Daniel Kahneman's exploration of the two systems that drive our thinking—fast and intuitive vs. slow and deliberative.

On Bullshit (bookgraila.2): Harry G. Frankfurt's rigorous exploration of 'bullshit'—communication intended to persuade without regard for truth.

Zombies in Western Culture: A Twenty-First Century Crisis (bookgrailb): An exploration of the metaphorical richness zombies offer in discussing our culture, psychology, and philosophical standing.

Addiction and the Brain: Development, Not Disease (bookgrailc): Marc Lewis's work disputes the disease model of addiction, arguing that it emerges through the brain's natural development process.

Pensées (bookgraild): Blaise Pascal's collection of thoughts and ideas on religion and philosophy.

Principal Doctrines of Epicureanism (bookgraile): Epicurus's work proposing a life led by simple pleasures, friendship, and a quiet life as the path to happiness.

I Ching (bookgrailf.1): One of the oldest Chinese texts, offering wisdom and guidance through a divination system.

Tractatus Logico-Philosophicus (bookgrailf.2): Wittgenstein's ambitious project attempts to identify the relationship between language and reality and to define the limits of science.
 
Process and Reality (bookgrailg): Alfred North Whitehead's Process and Reality is a comprehensive exploration of metaphysical philosophy. It establishes Whitehead's process philosophy, which posits that reality is composed of processes rather than material objects. It's a challenging text that radically reinterprets many of philosophy's fundamental concepts
==References==
[[Category:Meta-attention]]
[[sn:Counter-Spiralling]][[Category:Ninefold vaccine]]
[[sn:Counter-Spiralling]][[Category:Booster shots]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
